title: T-043 — ZPL label generation service + print endpoint
prompt:
# T-043 — ZPL label generation service

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §15.1, §15.3, V-WH-LABEL-001/003/004/005.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Generate a ZPL 4×6 label for an LP and POST it to the printer's TCP socket; expose `POST /api/warehouse/license-plates/:id/print-label`.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/zpl-renderer.ts` exposes `renderLpLabelZpl(lp, copies)`. `apps/web/app/api/warehouse/license-plates/[id]/print-label/route.ts` accepts {copies, printer_id?} and sends ZPL via TCP to printer.ip:9100. Validate copies in 1..10 (V-WH-LABEL-004). Validate GTIN-14 check digit (V-WH-LABEL-001). Verify printer online flag (V-WH-LABEL-003) — fail with 503 + retry hint when offline.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/zpl-renderer.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/license-plates/[id]/print-label/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/zpl-renderer.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an LP with batch and expiry, when renderLpLabelZpl runs, then output contains barcode (Code 128) of LP number and the expiry date.
2. Given copies=11, when endpoint is hit, then 422 returns with V-WH-LABEL-004 reason.
3. Given printer.online=false, when endpoint is hit, then 503 returns with retry hint and no TCP write occurs.
4. Given GTIN check-digit invalid, when renderLpLabelZpl runs, then it raises V-WH-LABEL-001.

## Test strategy
- RED: zpl-renderer.test.ts covers content, copies bound, printer offline, GTIN check.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test zpl-renderer`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not embed printer secrets in ZPL.
- Do not skip GTIN validation.
- Do not retry indefinitely on TCP failure.

pipeline_inputs.description: ZPL renderer + print endpoint with copies bound, GTIN check, printer-online guard.
pipeline_inputs.details: TCP socket send to printer.ip:9100; copies 1..10; offline printer 503; barcode includes LP number + QR LP URL.
out_of_scope: Print-on-receipt auto enqueue (uses this service when print_label_on_receipt=true; wired in T-021/T-022)

Given GTIN check-digit invalid, when renderLpLabelZpl runs, then V-WH-LABEL-001 raises
test_strategy: RED: zpl-renderer.test.ts covers content, copies bound, printer offline, GTIN check
risk_red_lines: Do not embed printer secrets in ZPL
Do not retry indefinitely on TCP failure
